December 2024 K. Schneider • Added valid values for IP, LT, OT, and RX claim header records: 
ADMTG_PRVDR_SPCTLY_CD, BLG_PRVDR_SPCLTY_CD, 
RFRG_PRVDR_SPCLTY_CD, and SRVC_PRVDR_SPCLTY_CD; 
ADMTG_PRVDR_TYPE_CD, BLG_PRVDR_TYPE_CD, 
RFRG_PRVDR_TYPE_CD, and SRVC_PRVDR_TYPE_CD 
• Added value for Guam to STATE_CD and SUBMTG_STATE_CD 
and added detail to SUBMTG_STATE_CD for MT TPA
